props.html:
O Beach Ibiza is leading the way in the world of daytime parties, fuelled by love, music and a little bit of Ibiza magic. Behind every facet of the ultimate day club experience is an incredibly hard-working team, and we couldn’t do what we do without all members of the O Beach Ibiza family.

We offer jobs in Ibiza to those who push the ordinary aside for the extraordinary. Our workplace is a melting pot of different cultures, offering you the chance to grow personally and professionally. We take our work seriously, but not ourselves, and welcome applications from all walks of life.
